name: Matomo Analytics Connector
description: Traffic analytics dashboard for one or more Matomo instances: visits, trends, top pages, sources, devices, geo, audience insights and AI anomaly detection — track multiple sites/projects side by side.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_traffic_overview
tools.description: Last 7 days traffic: visits, pageviews, bounce rate, avg session time, week-over-week change

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_top_pages
tools.description: Top 10 pages by visits this week with bounce rate and avg time on page

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_realtime
tools.description: Real-time visitor counts: last 30, 60, 180 minutes

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_matomo_config
tools.description: Matomo connection status, configured sites/projects, UTM dimension ID

tools.name: traffic
tools.description: Website visits summary: total visits, pageviews, unique visitors, bounce rate, avg time on site, daily/weekly/monthly series. Use for: покажи трафик, сколько посетителей, визиты за период, pageviews, сводка по трафику, traffic overview, how many visitors.

period.description: Granularity: day, week, month, year, or range (for custom date spans). Use 'range' when the user specifies a specific start and end date.
period.title: Period

date.description: Matomo date string. Presets: today, yesterday, last7, last14, last30, last90, thisWeek, lastWeek, thisMonth, lastMonth, thisYear. Custom range: use period='range' and date='YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD' — e.g. 'с 10 апреля по 20 апреля' → period=range, date=2026-04-10,2026-04-20.
date.title: Date

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

sites.description: Compare 2+ sites/domains side by side - a list of labels from list_sites, e.g. ['Main', 'Blog']. When given, this replaces `site` and the result is a per-site breakdown instead of a single answer. Omit for a normal, single-site question.
sites.title: Sites

tools.name: top_pages
tools.description: Most visited pages ranked by visits with bounce rate and avg time on page. Use for: топ страниц, популярные страницы, какие страницы смотрят, most popular content, best performing pages, top content.

period.description: Granularity: day, week, month, year, or range (for custom date spans). Use 'range' when the user specifies a specific start and end date.
period.title: Period

date.description: Matomo date string. Presets: today, yesterday, last7, last14, last30, last90, thisWeek, lastWeek, thisMonth, lastMonth, thisYear. Custom range: use period='range' and date='YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD' — e.g. 'с 10 апреля по 20 апреля' → period=range, date=2026-04-10,2026-04-20.
date.title: Date

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

sites.description: Compare 2+ sites/domains side by side - a list of labels from list_sites, e.g. ['Main', 'Blog']. When given, this replaces `site` and the result is a per-site breakdown instead of a single answer. Omit for a normal, single-site question.
sites.title: Sites

tools.name: trends
tools.description: Week-over-week traffic comparison: this week vs last week, % change, direction. Use for: трафик растёт или падает, сравни недели, WoW, week over week, растёт ли сайт, динамика трафика, трафик вверх или вниз.

params_schema.description: Compares the last 7 full days to the 7 before that.

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

sites.description: Compare 2+ sites/domains side by side - a list of labels from list_sites, e.g. ['Main', 'Blog']. When given, this replaces `site` and the result is a per-site breakdown instead of a single answer. Omit for a normal, single-site question.
sites.title: Sites

params_schema.title: TrendsParams

tools.name: save_settings
tools.description: Save the Analytics extension's non-credential settings (segment, UTM dimension). Matomo URL/Auth Token are entered via the Secrets panel, not here.

params_schema.description:
Form payload for non-secret settings. Matomo URL/Auth Token live in the
platform's Secrets panel (EXT-SECRETS-V1), not here.
params_schema.title: SaveSettingsParams

tools.name: add_site
tools.description: Add a site/project to track — either a whole Matomo site, or a specific subdomain/section that shares a site_id with other content (via segment). Use for: добавь сайт, новый проект, add another site, track a second project separately, track just the blog/docs/forum subdomain, добавить ещё один сайт.

label.description: Display name for this site/project, e.g. 'Main Website' or 'Site 2'.
label.title: Label

site_id.description: The Matomo site ID (idSite) to track under this label.
site_id.title: Site Id

segment.description: Optional Matomo segment to scope this project to part of the site instead of the whole thing - e.g. a subdomain that shares a Matomo site_id with other content. Use site_domains to see the real domains configured for a site_id, then pass segment="pageUrl=^<that domain URL>" (e.g. pageUrl=^https://blog.example.com). Leave blank to track the entire site.
segment.title: Segment

tools.name: remove_site
tools.description: Remove a tracked site/project by its label (from list_sites).

label.description: Label of the site to remove, as shown by list_sites.
label.title: Label

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List all sites/projects configured for this Matomo account. Use for: какие сайты подключены, список проектов, list my sites.

tools.name: set_active_site
tools.description: Switch which site/project is the default - used by the sidebar, the dashboard and chat questions where the user doesn't name a site. Use for: переключи на сайт X, сделай сайт X основным, switch to site X, make X the default site/project.

label.description: Label of the site/project to make the default (from list_sites).
label.title: Label

tools.name: site_domains
tools.description: Which domains/URLs are actually configured for a site/project in Matomo - the real main_url and every URL alias from Matomo's own SitesManager, not guessed from referrer or page traffic. Also suggests a ready-to-use segment for each domain, for tracking one subdomain (e.g. a blog) separately via add_site. Use for: какие домены привязаны к сайту, какой домен у сайта, site domains, site URLs, what domains does this site cover, как отследить отдельно поддомен.

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

tools.name: view_domain
tools.description: Scope the CURRENT site/project down to one domain, when its Matomo site_id covers several URL aliases (e.g. jump straight to a blog subdomain within the same project) - pass domain='All domains' to go back to the whole site. This updates that project's own segment in place, it does NOT add a new site/project (use add_site for that, to give a sub-project its own permanent label). Use for: покажи только блог, switch to domain X, view just this subdomain, смотреть только на этот домен, только для домена.

site_id.description: Matomo site_id to pick a domain within (from site_domains/list_sites).
site_id.title: Site Id

domain.description: One of the domains returned by site_domains for this site_id, or 'All domains' to clear the filter and view the whole site again.
domain.title: Domain

tools.name: real_time
tools.description: Live active visitors right now: 30 min / 60 min / 3 hour windows. Use for: сколько людей сейчас на сайте, онлайн посетители, live visitors, real-time, кто сейчас.

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

sites.description: Compare 2+ sites/domains side by side - a list of labels from list_sites, e.g. ['Main', 'Blog']. When given, this replaces `site` and the result is a per-site breakdown instead of a single answer. Omit for a normal, single-site question.
sites.title: Sites

tools.name: sources
tools.description: Traffic sources breakdown: Direct Entry, Search Engines, Websites, Social Networks, Campaigns. ALWAYS use for: откуда идёт трафик, откуда трафик на сайт, источники трафика, откуда приходят люди, топ источников, прямые переходы, реферальные ссылки, поисковый трафик, direct vs organic, where does traffic come from, traffic sources.

period.title: Period

tools.name: insights
tools.description: Actionable insights: traffic drops, high bounce hotspots, growing/dying pages. Free, no AI tokens. Use for: что нужно исправить, аномалии, проблемы с сайтом, что плохо работает, что делать, где теряем трафик, recommendations.

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

tools.description: Daily traffic brief with AI narration. USES AI TOKENS. Runs in background — result auto-delivered to chat when done.

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

tools.description: Spot anomalies against the last 7 days. Free (no AI tokens).

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site

tools.name: ai_referrers
tools.description: Which AI assistants and LLMs send traffic — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Copilot. Combines referrer detection + UTM tracking. Default period=month for meaningful data. Use for: с каких нейросетей трафик, ChatGPT traffic, AI referrers, нейронки шлют трафик, which AI sends visitors, LLM traffic.

period.description: Granularity: day, week, month, year, or range (for custom date spans). Use 'range' when the user specifies a specific start and end date.
period.title: Period

date.description: Matomo date string. Presets: today, yesterday, last7, last14, last30, last90, thisWeek, lastWeek, thisMonth, lastMonth, thisYear. Custom range: use period='range' and date='YYYY-MM-DD,YYYY-MM-DD' — e.g. 'с 10 апреля по 20 апреля' → period=range, date=2026-04-10,2026-04-20.
date.title: Date

site.description: Which site/project to report on - a label from list_sites (the name the user gave when adding it). Omit to use the user's default site.
site.title: Site
